panels.description: Medium shot: Captain Walton speaking with passionate fervor, gesturing with his hands. Across from him, the Stranger sits in the shadows of the cabin, his face darkening with sudden gloom upon hearing Walton's ambition. Dim candlelight, melancholic atmosphere.

bubbles.text: I would sacrifice my existence to the furtherance of my enterprise!

panels.description: Close up: The stranger covering his eyes with his hands, tears trickling down his fingers, chest heaving with a deep, pained groan. The expression is one of intense, shattering grief.

bubbles.text: Unhappy man! Do you share my madness? Let me reveal my tale, and you will dash the cup from your lips!

panels.description: Medium shot: Hours later. The cabin interior, peaceful and dimly lit. The stranger looks composed, sitting by a desk, looking inquisitively at Walton. The tension has dissipated into a quiet, heavy calm.

bubbles.text: Tell me, Walton... the history of your earlier years.

panels.description: Medium close-up: The stranger leaning forward, expression weary and soulful. His face is illuminated by a single lamp, highlighting the lines of deep, settled grief.

bubbles.text: You have hope... but I have lost everything.

panels.description: Wide shot: A silhouette of the stranger looking out of a ship cabin window toward a vast, starry, celestial sea. He appears isolated, as if surrounded by a faint, otherworldly glow or halo. Dreamy, ethereal lighting.

bubbles.text: Such a man has a double existence... a celestial spirit within whose circle no grief ventures.
